description: Curated index of command-backed and docs-only routines.
source_of_truth_note: Runbooks, routine docs, and scripts are authoritative; this registry is a navigation aid.

items.name: Prompt Execution
items.purpose: Run one active prompt in a fresh session from startup through scoped implementation.
items.safe_use_notes: Run exactly one prompt unless the operator explicitly expands scope.

items.name: Completion Audit
items.purpose: Compare required prompt deliverables and validation evidence against actual repo changes.
items.safe_use_notes: Do not claim completion for unchecked deliverables.

items.name: Next-Prompt Preflight
items.purpose: Inspect the immediate next prompt for obvious readiness blockers or warnings.
items.safe_use_notes: Do not implement the future prompt during preflight.

items.name: Bridge Decision And Handoff
items.purpose: Decide whether a cheap bridge fix or temporary handoff is materially needed.
items.safe_use_notes: Create `tmp/HANDOFF.md` only for real blockers or non-trivial warnings.

items.name: Run Closeout
items.purpose: Leave the repo ready for review or a fresh next session after validation and preflight.
items.safe_use_notes: Final answers can carry routine completion notes; avoid unnecessary handoff files.

items.name: Promotion Review
items.purpose: Decide whether temporary observations become durable memory or findings.
items.safe_use_notes: Unreviewed transcript content is not durable memory.

items.name: Registry Check
items.purpose: Validate curated registry JSON files and prompt ordering.
items.safe_use_notes: Read-only check; registries remain navigation aids.
